blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify role assignments and compensation calculations.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Role-based compensation rules', but the evidence provided does not include any details on how roles are assigned or how compensation is calculated based on those roles. The linked use case mentions different pay rates for roles, but there is no concrete evidence of these rules being applied in the booking process. This lack of evidence leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of explicit assignment of roles and their corresponding compensation in the booking process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify role assignments and compensation calculations.
